sections.heading: This Order may be cited as the Competition and Fair Trading Title
sections.text:
This Order may be cited as the Competition and Fair Trading Title
(Commencement) Order, 1995.

sections.heading: The Competition and Fair Trading Act, 1994, shall come Commence­
sections.text:
The Competition and Fair Trading Act, 1994, shall come Commence­
into operation with effect from 10th February, 1995. ment
D. K. A. PATEi.,
LUSAKA Minister of Commerce, Trade
9th February, 1995 and Industry
